info.name: Adblock Compiler API
info.description: Comprehensive test collection for the Adblock Compiler OpenAPI specification

variable.description: Admin API key for protected admin endpoints (X-Admin-Key header)
User ID captured from Create User response
API key prefix captured from Create API Key response

request.description: Get API information including version and available endpoints
Get performance metrics aggregated over the last 30 minutes
Compile a simple filter list with pre-fetched content
Test multiple transformations with benchmarking
Test caching behavior
Test error handling with invalid configuration
Test Server-Sent Events streaming

exec: pm.test('Each result has id and rules', function () {

request.description: Batch compile multiple filter lists
Test batch limit of 10 requests
Queue an async compilation job
Queue a batch async compilation
Get queue statistics
Retrieve results from queued job
Test with empty request body
Test with missing required sources field
Test batch request exceeding 10 item limit
Basic health check — returns service status and version
Returns results from the most recent health monitoring workflow run
Create a new user. Requires Hyperdrive (PostgreSQL) binding.
Create a new API key for a user. The raw key is returned only once — store it securely. Requires Hyperdrive.

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200 or 400 or 503', function () {

request.description: List all API keys for a user (key hashes are not returned). Requires Hyperdrive.

request.description: Revoke an API key by ID or key prefix. Requires Hyperdrive.
Validate an API key without authenticating a full request. Useful for the admin UI to test keys. Requires Hyperdrive.
Returns health and connectivity status of both D1 (SQLite) and PostgreSQL backends.
Dry-run migration: counts D1 rows without writing to PostgreSQL. Requires both D1 and Hyperdrive bindings.
Migrate data from D1 (SQLite) to PostgreSQL via Hyperdrive. Idempotent and resumable. Requires both D1 and Hyperdrive bindings.
Storage statistics from the PostgreSQL backend (mirrors /admin/storage/stats for D1). Requires Hyperdrive.
Export storage data from PostgreSQL as JSON. Returns a downloadable attachment. Requires Hyperdrive.
Delete all expired entries from PostgreSQL storage and cache tables. Requires Hyperdrive.
Delete all cache entries from PostgreSQL tables. Requires Hyperdrive.

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200 or 400 or 503', function () {

request.description: Execute a read-only SELECT query against PostgreSQL for debugging. Only SELECT statements are allowed. Requires Hyperdrive.
